zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff於1425年1月1日出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾曼諾爾代洛時，他的父親Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas32歲，母親Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn26歲。他於大約1443年與Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年4月在威爾士凱爾納方史爾巴德 易曼德享年49歲，埋葬在威爾士凱爾納方史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff于1425年1月1日出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾曼諾爾代洛时，他的父亲Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas32岁，母亲Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn26岁。他于大约1443年与Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年4月在威尔士凱爾納方史爾巴德 易曼德享年49岁，埋葬在威尔士凱爾納方史爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff was born on 1 January 1425, in Manordeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, was 32 and his mother, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, was 26. He married Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith about 1443, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died in April 1474, in Bardsey Island, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 49, and was buried in Caernarfonshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff est né le 1 janvier 1425, à Manordeilo, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith environ 1443, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1474, à Bardsey Island, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Caernarfonshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff am 1. Januar 1425 in Manordeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas 32 und seine Mutter Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn 26. Er hat um 1443 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1474 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Bardsey Island, Caernarfonshire, Wales und wurde in Caernarfonshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff è nato il il 1 gennaio 1425 nel Manordeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith circa 1443, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1474, nel Bardsey Island, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Caernarfonshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiffが1425年1月1日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアマノーデイロで生まれた時，父Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolasは32歳，母Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnnは26歳であった。約1443年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでElsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年4月にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバードセイ イスランドで49歳で死去し，ウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff(이)가 1425년 1월 1일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 먼르데이로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1443년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 4월 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 바드시 이슬랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1425, em Manordeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith aproximadamente 1443, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1474, em Bardsey Island, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Caernarfonshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff родился 1 января 1425 г. в местности манордилоу, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith около 1443 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1474 г. в местности бардси исланд, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс.

sm.(1425-1474): mai le 1425 e o'o I le 1474

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas ap Gruffydd Earl of Cardiff nació el 1 de enero de 1425, en Manordeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Gruffudd ap Nicolas, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mabli verch Maredudd Dwnn, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elsbeth  Elisabeth deBourgogne ap Gruffudd  Griffith aproximadamente 1443, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1474, en Bardsey Island, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Caernarfonshire, Gales.
